---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or documentation improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request.

## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish in Proxmox or Pi?

## Proposed interface

If relevant, describe:

- expected tool name
- expected parameters
- expected output

## Official API reference

If this maps to a Proxmox endpoint, include the path if you know it.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help shape the feature.
